blocks.original_text: Eddard Stark had left before dawn, Septa Mordane informed Sansa as they broke their fast. “The king sent for him. Another hunt, I do believe. There are still wild aurochs in these lands, I am told.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 早餐时Septa Mordane告诉Sansa，Eddard天亮前应国王召唤离开，可能又去猎取当地仍存的aurochs。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段建立Sansa对Joffrey和queen茶会的期待，并用rubies、骑行和沿途景物展示姐妹完全不同的注意方式。
blocks.background_zh: **动物：** aurochs是体型巨大的野牛；Robert此时可能正在进行另一场狩猎。

blocks.original_text: “I’ve never seen an aurochs,” Sansa said, feeding a piece of bacon to Lady under the table. The direwolf took it from her hand, as delicate as a queen.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa说自己从未见过aurochs，同时在桌下喂Lady培根；direwolf像queen般轻柔地从她手中取食。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Lady取培根“as delicate as a queen”，把direwolf行为写成Sansa理想贵族女性气质的镜像。

blocks.original_text: Septa Mordane sniffed in disapproval. “A noble lady does not feed dogs at her table,” she said, breaking off another piece of comb and letting the honey drip down onto her bread.
blocks.explanation_zh: Septa Mordane不赞成贵族小姐在桌边喂“狗”，自己却让蜂蜜从蜂巢滴到面包上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: septa一边训斥桌边喂动物，一边让蜂蜜滴落，细节使礼仪权威带有轻微喜剧性的选择性。

blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa纠正Lady是direwolf而非dog，并引用Eddard许可证明可以让它们随身。

blocks.original_text: The septa was not appeased. “You’re a good girl, Sansa, but I do vow, when it comes to that creature you’re as willful as your sister Arya.” She scowled. “And where is Arya this morning?”

blocks.literary_note_zh: 把Sansa和Arya相提并论是septa最有效的批评，因为Sansa的自我认同正建立在“我不像妹妹”上。

blocks.original_text: Sansa already looked her best. She had brushed out her long auburn hair until it shone, and picked her nicest blue silks. She had been looking forward to today for more than a week. It was a great honor to ride with the queen, and besides, Prince Joffrey might be there. Her betrothed. Just thinking it made her feel a strange fluttering inside, even though they were not to marry for years and years. Sansa did not really know Joffrey yet, but she was already in love with him. He was all she ever dreamt her prince should be, tall and handsome and strong, with hair like gold. She treasured every chance to spend time with him, few as they were. The only thing that scared her about today was Arya. Arya had a way of ruining everything. You never knew what she would do. “I’ll tell her,” Sansa said uncertainly, “but she’ll dress the way she always does.” She hoped it wouldn’t be too embarrassing. “May I be excused?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa早已穿最好蓝丝绸并期待一周，只因可能见到未婚夫Joffrey便认定自己爱上他；她唯一担心Arya破坏完美日子。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa承认并不了解Joffrey，却已“爱上”他所符合的prince模板；她爱的是故事角色与外貌线索先于真实人格。

blocks.original_text: “You may.” Septa Mordane helped herself to more bread and honey, and Sansa slid from the bench. Lady followed at her heels as she ran from the inn’s common room.
blocks.explanation_zh: 得到离席许可后，Sansa离开旅店common room，Lady紧跟其后。

blocks.original_text: Outside, she stood for a moment amidst the shouts and curses and the creak of wooden wheels as the men broke down the tents and pavilions and loaded the wagons for another day’s march. The inn was a sprawling three-story structure of pale stone, the biggest that Sansa had ever seen, but even so, it had accommodations for less than a third of the king’s party, which had swollen to more than four hundred with the addition of her father’s household and the freeriders who had joined them on the road.
blocks.explanation_zh: 旅店外营地正在拆帐、装车；即使这是Sansa见过最大旅店，也容不下已膨胀到四百多人的王室队伍。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 四百余人使王室旅行像移动城镇；沿途资源紧张也解释Arya为何能接触不同阶级的大量人员。

blocks.original_text: She found Arya on the banks of the Trident, trying to hold Nymeria still while she brushed dried mud from her fur. The direwolf was not enjoying the process. Arya was wearing the same riding leathers she had worn yesterday and the day before.

blocks.original_text: “I’m not,” Arya said, trying to brush a tangle out of Nymeria’s matted grey fur. “Mycah and I are going to ride upstream and look for rubies at the ford.”

blocks.original_text: “What could you want to see?” Sansa said, annoyed. She had been thrilled by the invitation, and her stupid sister was going to ruin everything, just as she’d feared. “It’s all just fields and farms and holdfasts.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa认为沿途不过是田野、农场和holdfasts，又恼怒妹妹果然要毁掉自己珍视的邀请。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa称沿途“只是”田野和农场，Arya认为真正问题是她没有观看；这不是风景本身，而是注意力方式之争。

blocks.original_text: “I hate riding,” Sansa said fervently. “All it does is get you soiled and dusty and sore.”

blocks.original_text: Arya shrugged. “Hold still,” she snapped at Nymeria, “I’m not hurting you.” Then to Sansa she said, “When we were crossing the Neck, I counted thirty-six flowers I never saw before, and Mycah showed me a lizard-lion.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya边与Nymeria纠缠边说穿越Neck时数到三十六种新花，Mycah还带她看了lizard-lion。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三十六种新花和lizard-lion说明Arya不是无目的逃规矩，她正在用身体旅行建立自己的自然知识。

blocks.original_text: Sansa shuddered. They had been twelve days crossing the Neck, rumbling down a crooked causeway through an endless black bog, and she had hated every moment of it. The air had been damp and clammy, the causeway so narrow they could not even make proper camp at night, they had to stop right on the kingsroad. Dense thickets of half-drowned trees pressed close around them, branches dripping with curtains of pale fungus. Huge flowers bloomed in the mud and floated on pools of stagnant water, but if you were stupid enough to leave the causeway to pluck them, there were quicksands waiting to suck you down, and snakes watching from the trees, and lizard-lions floating half-submerged in the water, like black logs with eyes and teeth.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa回忆自己厌恶Neck十二天的潮湿、狭窄causeway、fungus、quicksand、蛇和潜伏水中的lizard-lions。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Neck描写同时证明Sansa并非“什么都没看见”；她观察细致，只把所见组织成危险、污秽和不适，而非发现。
blocks.background_zh: **地理：** Neck是北境南缘湿地，kingsroad沿狭窄causeway穿过；quicksand与lizard-lions构成真实危险。

blocks.original_text: None of which stopped Arya, of course. One day she came back grinning her horsey grin, her hair all tangled and her clothes covered in mud, clutching a raggedy bunch of purple and green flowers for Father. Sansa kept hoping he would tell Arya to behave herself and act like the highborn lady she was supposed to be, but he never did, he only hugged her and thanked her for the flowers. That just made her worse.
blocks.explanation_zh: 危险没有阻止Arya；她曾满身泥地带花给Eddard，Sansa希望父亲训她，Eddard却拥抱感谢，使Sansa认为妹妹更任性。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa期待父亲用高贵小姐规范惩罚Arya，Eddard却感谢花；她把父亲的接纳理解为纵容，因为它威胁单一好女孩标准。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: Then it turned out the purple flowers were called poison kisses, and Arya got a rash on her arms. Sansa would have thought that might have taught her a lesson, but Arya laughed about it, and the next day she rubbed mud all over her arms like some ignorant bog woman just because her friend Mycah told her it would stop the itching. She had bruises on her arms and shoulders too, dark purple welts and faded green-and-yellow splotches, Sansa had seen them when her sister undressed for sleep. How she had gotten those only the seven gods knew.
blocks.explanation_zh: 花原来叫poison kisses并令Arya起rash，她却笑着接受Mycah用泥止痒的办法；Sansa还看见她身上有来源不明的bruises与welts。
blocks.literary_note_zh: rash似乎应成为教训，Arya却把它变成可笑故事和新知识；姐妹对错误的理解分别是羞耻与经验。

blocks.original_text: Arya was still going on, brushing out Nymeria’s tangles and chattering about things she’d seen on the trek south. “Last week we found this haunted watchtower, and the day before we chased a herd of wild horses. You should have seen them run when they caught a scent of Nymeria.” The wolf wriggled in her grasp and Arya scolded her. “Stop that, I have to do the other side, you’re all muddy.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya继续谈haunted watchtower、wild horses等南行见闻，同时追逐不肯被梳毛的Nymeria。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过Neck回忆、朋友阶级和direwolf性格加深姐妹冲突；Sansa的核心愿望是让家人与世界符合songs的漂亮秩序。

blocks.original_text: Arya shrugged. “I didn’t go far. Anyway, Nymeria was with me the whole time. I don’t always go off, either. Sometimes it’s fun just to ride along with the wagons and talk to people.”

blocks.original_text: Sansa knew all about the sorts of people Arya liked to talk to: squires and grooms and serving girls, old men and naked children, rough-spoken freeriders of uncertain birth. Arya would make friends with anybody. This Mycah was the worst; a butcher’s boy, thirteen and wild, he slept in the meat wagon and smelled of the slaughtering block. Just the sight of him was enough to make Sansa feel sick, but Arya seemed to prefer his company to hers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa鄙视Arya结交的squires、grooms、serving girls和出身不明者，尤其讨厌睡meat wagon、带屠宰气味的butcher’s boy Mycah。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa列举Arya朋友时以职业、衣着和出生分类，Mycah的气味更让阶级成为身体反感。
blocks.background_zh: **阶级：** Mycah是随王室队伍南行的butcher’s boy；Sansa以职业和气味评价他，Arya则称其为friend。

blocks.original_text: Sansa was running out of patience now. “You have to come with me,” she told her sister firmly. “You can’t refuse the queen. Septa Mordane will expect you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 耐心耗尽的Sansa命Arya随自己回去，因为不能拒绝queen，Septa Mordane也会等她。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过Neck回忆、朋友阶级和direwolf性格加深姐妹冲突；Sansa的核心愿望是让家人与世界符合songs的漂亮秩序。

blocks.original_text: Arya ignored her. She gave a hard yank with the brush. Nymeria growled and spun away, affronted. “Come back here!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya不理她，粗暴拉刷子惹Nymeria低吼逃开，又追着狼叫它回来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过Neck回忆、朋友阶级和direwolf性格加深姐妹冲突；Sansa的核心愿望是让家人与世界符合songs的漂亮秩序。

blocks.original_text: “There’s going to be lemon cakes and tea,” Sansa went on, all adult and reasonable. Lady brushed against her leg. Sansa scratched her ears the way she liked, and Lady sat beside her on her haunches, watching Arya chase Nymeria. “Why would you want to ride a smelly old horse and get all sore and sweaty when you could recline on feather pillows and eat cakes with the queen?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa用成人般合理语气描述lemon cakes、羽毛枕与queen茶会，问Arya为何宁愿骑臭马受累。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa自称“adult and reasonable”，但论证完全由cakes、pillows和queen构成；成熟姿态与儿童欲望并存。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: “I don’t like the queen,” Arya said casually. Sansa sucked in her breath, shocked that even Arya would say such a thing, but her sister prattled on, heedless. “She won’t even let me bring Nymeria.” She thrust the brush under her belt and stalked her wolf. Nymeria watched her approach warily.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya随口说自己不喜欢queen，令Sansa震惊；她继续抱怨queen不准Nymeria进入wheelhouse。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya一句“不喜欢queen”让Sansa震惊，不是因具体理由，而是她认为王权对象本身不应被个人喜恶评价。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: “A royal wheelhouse is no place for a wolf,” Sansa said. “And Princess Myrcella is afraid of them, you know that.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa说royal wheelhouse不适合狼，而且Myrcella害怕它们。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过Neck回忆、朋友阶级和direwolf性格加深姐妹冲突；Sansa的核心愿望是让家人与世界符合songs的漂亮秩序。

blocks.original_text: “Myrcella is a little baby.” Arya grabbed Nymeria around her neck, but the moment she pulled out the brush again the direwolf wriggled free and bounded off. Frustrated, Arya threw down the brush. “Bad wolf!” she shouted.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya说Myrcella像小婴儿，抓住Nymeria后又被挣脱，最终气得扔刷子骂“坏狼”。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过Neck回忆、朋友阶级和direwolf性格加深姐妹冲突；Sansa的核心愿望是让家人与世界符合songs的漂亮秩序。

blocks.original_text: Sansa couldn’t help but smile a little. The kennelmaster once told her that an animal takes after its master. She gave Lady a quick little hug. Lady licked her cheek. Sansa giggled. Arya heard and whirled around, glaring. “I don’t care what you say, I’m going out riding.” Her long horsey face got the stubborn look that meant she was going to do something willful.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa想起kennelmaster说动物像主人，便抱住温顺Lady暗笑；Arya察觉后怒视并再次坚持出去骑马。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 动物像主人这一说法让Sansa以Lady温顺证明自己优雅，也以Nymeria反衬Arya；她主动选择最利于自我形象的解释。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: “Gods be true, Arya, sometimes you act like such a child,” Sansa said. “I’ll go by myself then. It will be ever so much nicer that way. Lady and I will eat all the lemon cakes and just have the best time without you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa反说Arya像孩子，自己单独去会更愉快，还故意说要与Lady吃光lemon cakes。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过Neck回忆、朋友阶级和direwolf性格加深姐妹冲突；Sansa的核心愿望是让家人与世界符合songs的漂亮秩序。

blocks.original_text: She turned to walk off, but Arya shouted after her, “They won’t let you bring Lady either.” She was gone before Sansa could think of a reply, chasing Nymeria along the river.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya临走前提醒queen同样不会让Lady进入wheelhouse，随即追Nymeria离开，使Sansa无从回击。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya指出Lady也会被排除，击穿Sansa“我与Lady一起享受茶会”的炫耀，令Sansa感到被妹妹羞辱。

blocks.original_text: Alone and humiliated, Sansa took the long way back to the inn, where she knew Septa
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa独自受辱，绕长路返回Septa Mordane等候的旅店。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过Neck回忆、朋友阶级和direwolf性格加深姐妹冲突；Sansa的核心愿望是让家人与世界符合songs的漂亮秩序。

blocks.original_text: Mordane would be waiting. Lady padded quietly by her side. She was almost in tears. All she wanted was for things to be nice and pretty, the way they were in the songs. Why couldn’t Arya be sweet and delicate and kind, like Princess Myrcella? She would have liked a sister like that.
blocks.explanation_zh: Lady安静陪伴几乎落泪的Sansa；她只希望世界像songs一样漂亮，无法理解Arya为何不像Myrcella般甜美优雅。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa想要一切“像songs一样漂亮”，这是全章核心过滤器：现实价值取决于能否维持既定故事形式。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: Sansa could never understand how two sisters, born only two years apart, could be so different. It would have been easier if Arya had been a bastard, like their half brother Jon. She even looked like Jon, with the long face and brown hair of the Starks, and nothing of their lady mother in her face or her coloring. And Jon’s mother had been common, or so people whispered. Once, when she was littler, Sansa had even asked Mother if perhaps there hadn’t been some mistake. Perhaps the grumkins had stolen her real sister. But Mother had only laughed and said no, Arya was her daughter and Sansa’s trueborn sister, blood of their blood. Sansa could not think why Mother would want to lie about it, so she supposed it had to be true.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa甚至幻想Arya若像Jon一样是bastard会更容易解释差异；Catelyn曾明确告诉她Arya是trueborn亲妹妹。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她用bastard身份想象解释姐妹差异，显示合法出生在她心中不仅是法律地位，也被误当成性格和外貌一致性的保证。

blocks.original_text: As she neared the center of camp, her distress was quickly forgotten. A crowd had gathered around the queen’s wheelhouse. Sansa heard excited voices buzzing like a hive of bees. The doors had been thrown open, she saw, and the queen stood at the top of the wooden steps, smiling down at someone. She heard her saying, “The council does us great honor, my good lords.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 接近营地中心时，Sansa被wheelhouse周围蜂群般兴奋人声吸引，暂时忘记苦恼，并听见queen感谢council的礼遇。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让King’s Landing人物以铠甲、纹章和宫廷礼仪登场；Sansa成功识别Barristan与Renly，也把Joffrey的介入解释成英雄救美。

blocks.original_text: “What’s happening?” she asked a squire she knew.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa向认识的squire询问发生了什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让King’s Landing人物以铠甲、纹章和宫廷礼仪登场；Sansa成功识别Barristan与Renly，也把Joffrey的介入解释成英雄救美。

blocks.original_text: “The council sent riders from King’s Landing to escort us the rest of the way,” he told her. “An honor guard for the king.”
blocks.explanation_zh: squire解释council从King’s Landing派来骑手，为国王提供余程honor guard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让King’s Landing人物以铠甲、纹章和宫廷礼仪登场；Sansa成功识别Barristan与Renly，也把Joffrey的介入解释成英雄救美。
blocks.background_zh: **政治：** King’s Landing council派honor guard迎接国王队伍，带来Ser Barristan、Renly和Ser Ilyn。

blocks.original_text: Anxious to see, Sansa let Lady clear a path through the crowd. People moved aside hastily for the direwolf. When she got closer, she saw two knights kneeling before the queen, in armor so fine and gorgeous that it made her blink.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa让Lady替她从人群中开路，靠近后看见两名穿华美铠甲的骑士跪在queen面前。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Lady清路让Sansa快速靠近权力中心，同时也令普通人因direwolf恐惧退让；她把动物保护力量体验为社交通行证。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: One knight wore an intricate suit of white enameled scales, brilliant as a field of new-fallen snow, with silver chasings and clasps that glittered in the sun. When he removed his helm, Sansa saw that he was an old man with hair as pale as his armor, yet he seemed strong and graceful for all that. From his shoulders hung the pure white cloak of the Kingsguard.
blocks.explanation_zh: 一名老骑士穿雪白enameled scales与Kingsguard白斗篷，虽头发苍白却仍显强壮优雅。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa先看见白甲雪色与优雅，再看见老人身份；她习惯从纹章和外观读取骑士价值。
blocks.background_zh: **身份：** Ser Barristan Selmy是Kingsguard Lord Commander，绰号Barristan the Bold，曾先后服务Aerys与Robert。

blocks.original_text: His companion was a man near twenty whose armor was steel plate of a deep forest-green. He was the handsomest man Sansa had ever set eyes upon; tall and powerfully made, with jet-black hair that fell to his shoulders and framed a clean-shaven face, and laughing green eyes to match his armor. Cradled under one arm was an antlered helm, its magnificent rack shimmering in gold.
blocks.explanation_zh: 另一名近二十岁的骑士穿forest-green plate、手持金鹿角helm，黑发绿眼，是Sansa见过最英俊的男人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Renly几乎完全按romance男主角视觉语汇出现：青春、英俊、力量、黑发绿眼与金鹿角。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: At first Sansa did not notice the third stranger. He did not kneel with the others. He stood to one side, beside their horses, a gaunt grim man who watched the proceedings in silence. His face was pockmarked and beardless, with deepset eyes and hollow cheeks. Though he was not an old man, only a few wisps of hair remained to him, sprouting above his ears, but those he had grown long as a woman’s. His armor was iron-grey chainmail over layers of boiled leather, plain and unadorned, and it spoke of age and hard use. Above his right shoulder the stained leather hilt of the blade strapped to his back was visible; a two-handed greatsword, too long to be worn at his side.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa稍后才注意第三个陌生人：他沉默站在马旁，消瘦麻脸、头发稀少，穿朴素陈旧护甲，背负two-handed greatsword。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Ser Ilyn的朴素旧甲与前两人的闪耀形成反差；“hard use”让装备功能性比装饰更可怕。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: “The king is gone hunting, but I know he will be pleased to see you when he returns,” the queen was saying to the two knights who knelt before her, but Sansa could not take her eyes off the third man. He seemed to feel the weight of her gaze. Slowly he turned his head. Lady growled. A terror as overwhelming as anything Sansa Stark had ever felt filled her suddenly. She stepped backward and bumped into someone.
blocks.explanation_zh: queen与跪地骑士交谈时Sansa无法移开对第三人的目光；他转头回望，Lady低吼，Sansa被前所未有的恐惧压倒并后退撞人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Lady先于Sansa发出低吼；Sansa的恐惧没有明确理由，来自被第三人反向凝视的瞬间。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: Strong hands grasped her by the shoulders, and for a moment Sansa thought it was her father, but when she turned, it was the burned face of Sandor Clegane looking down at her, his mouth twisted in a terrible mockery of a smile. “You are shaking, girl,” he said, his voice rasping. “Do I frighten you so much?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 强壮双手抓住Sansa肩膀，她一度以为是父亲，回头却看见Sandor烧伤的脸和扭曲笑容，被问是否如此怕他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她先误认抓肩者为father，随后看见Sandor烧伤脸；安全期待和恐怖形象在同一转身中翻转。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: He did, and had since she had first laid eyes on the ruin that fire had made of his face, though it seemed to her now that he was not half so terrifying as the other. Still, Sansa wrenched away from him, and the Hound laughed, and Lady moved between them, rumbling a warning. Sansa dropped to her knees to wrap her arms around the wolf. They were all gathered around gaping, she could feel their eyes on her, and here and there she heard muttered comments and titters of laughter.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa一直怕Sandor，却觉得他不及第三人可怕；她挣脱后抱住挡在中间警告的Lady，因众人围观嘲笑而羞耻。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa此前怕Sandor，如今觉得他“不及另一人一半可怕”，恐惧是比较性的；围观笑声又立刻将危险转成羞耻。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: “A wolf,” a man said, and someone else said, “Seven hells, that’s a direwolf,” and the first man said, “What’s it doing in camp?” and the Hound’s rasping voice replied, “The Starks use them for wet nurses,” and Sansa realized that the two stranger knights were looking down on her and Lady, swords in their hands, and then she was frightened again, and ashamed. Tears filled her eyes.
blocks.explanation_zh: 人群惊讶direwolf出现在营地，Sandor讥讽Starks用狼当wet nurses；Sansa发现两名陌生骑士已拔剑，因此再次恐惧落泪。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sandor的wet nurse笑话把Stark与direwolf亲密关系幼儿化；拔剑骑士则表明围观者的笑闹可能迅速变成动物威胁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: She heard the queen say, “Joffrey, go to her.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa听见queen命Joffrey过去帮助她。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让King’s Landing人物以铠甲、纹章和宫廷礼仪登场；Sansa成功识别Barristan与Renly，也把Joffrey的介入解释成英雄救美。

blocks.original_text: And her prince was there.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她心目中的prince随即来到身边。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 独立句“And her prince was there”模拟songs中的英雄登场，完全贴合Sansa的期待结构。

blocks.original_text: “Leave her alone,” Joffrey said. He stood over her, beautiful in blue wool and black leather, his golden curls shining in the sun like a crown. He gave her his hand, drew her to her feet. “What is it, sweet lady? Why are you afraid? No one will hurt you. Put away your swords, all of you. The wolf is her little pet, that’s all.” He looked at Sandor Clegane. “And you, dog, away with you, you’re scaring my betrothed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey命众人放过Sansa、收剑，拉她起身并把Lady称作小宠物，又以“dog”命Sandor离开别吓自己的betrothed。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey此刻确实制止拔剑、扶她起身并驱走Sandor；精读应保留这些可见行为，同时注意他把保护者称作dog。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: The Hound, ever faithful, bowed and slid away quietly through the press. Sansa struggled to steady herself. She felt like such a fool. She was a Stark of Winterfell, a noble lady, and someday she would be a queen. “It was not him, my sweet prince,” she tried to explain. “It was the other one.”

blocks.original_text: It was a glorious day, a magical day. The air was warm and heavy with the scent of flowers, and the woods here had a gentle beauty that Sansa had never seen in the north. Prince Joffrey’s mount was a blood bay courser, swift as the wind, and he rode it with reckless abandon, so fast that Sansa was hard-pressed to keep up on her mare. It was a day for adventures. They explored the caves by the riverbank, and tracked a shadowcat to its lair, and when they grew hungry, Joffrey found a holdfast by its smoke and told them to fetch food and wine for their prince and his lady. They dined on trout fresh from the river, and Sansa drank more wine than she had ever drunk before. “My father only lets us have one cup, and only at feasts,” she confessed to her prince.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa把这天体验成魔法冒险：Joffrey高速骑马、探洞、追踪shadowcat、命holdfast供餐，Sansa还喝下超过以往的wine。

blocks.literary_note_zh: “my betrothed”听来像宠爱，也让十二岁Joffrey以关系身份越过Eddard对酒量的限制。

blocks.original_text: They went more slowly after they had eaten. Joffrey sang for her as they rode, his voice high and sweet and pure. Sansa was a little dizzy from the wine. “Shouldn’t we be starting back?” she asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: 饭后二人放慢速度，Joffrey甜声唱歌；微醺眩晕的Sansa开始询问是否该返回。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让Sansa为取悦Joffrey改写自己对骑马的喜好，并同意留下Lady与Sandor；魔法般的一天逐渐被酒、真剑和危险直觉侵入。

blocks.original_text: “Soon,” Joffrey said. “The battleground is right up ahead, where the river bends. That was where my father killed Rhaegar Targaryen, you know. He smashed in his chest, crunch, right through the armor.” Joffrey swung an imaginary warhammer to show her how it was done. “Then my uncle Jaime killed old Aerys, and my father was king. What’s that sound?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey说前方便是Robert杀Rhaegar的战场，兴奋模仿击碎胸甲，又讲Jaime杀Aerys，随后听见未知声响。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey把Rhaegar死亡表演成crunch音效和挥锤游戏，历史暴力成为少年继承王权的兴奋故事。
blocks.background_zh: **历史叙述：** Joffrey概括Robert在Trident杀Rhaegar、Jaime杀Aerys；其crunch式表演是少年主观讲述。

blocks.original_text: Sansa heard it too, floating through the woods, a kind of wooden clattering, snack snack snack. “I don’t know,” she said. It made her nervous, though. “Joffrey, let’s go back.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa也听见木头连续碰撞的声音，感到紧张并再次提议回去。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 未知木击声令Sansa第二次提出回去；她的危险直觉存在，但总被Joffrey的选择压过。

blocks.original_text: “I want to see what it is.” Joffrey turned his horse in the direction of the sounds, and Sansa had no choice but to follow. The noises grew louder and more distinct, the clack of wood on wood, and as they grew closer they heard heavy breathing as well, and now and then a grunt.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey坚持查看并转马追声，Sansa只得跟随；声音逐渐变成木击、粗重呼吸与grunt。

blocks.original_text: “Someone’s there,” Sansa said anxiously. She found herself thinking of Lady, wishing the direwolf was with her.

blocks.literary_note_zh: 真正靠近风险时，她开始想念Lady，说明先前同意绑狼并非没有安全代价。

blocks.original_text: “You’re safe with me.” Joffrey drew his Lion’s Tooth from its sheath. The sound of steel on leather made her tremble. “This way,” he said, riding through a stand of trees.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey拔出Lion’s Tooth保证她安全，钢刃出鞘声反而令她发抖，随后带路穿过树林。

blocks.original_text: Beyond, in a clearing overlooking the river, they came upon a boy and a girl playing at knights. Their swords were wooden sticks, broom handles from the look of them, and they were rushing across the grass, swinging at each other lustily. The boy was years older, a head taller, and much stronger, and he was pressing the attack. The girl, a scrawny thing in soiled leathers, was dodging and managing to get her stick in the way of most of the boy’s blows, but not all. When she tried to lunge at him, he caught her stick with his own, swept it aside, and slid his wood down hard on her fingers. She cried out and lost her weapon.
blocks.explanation_zh: 空地中Mycah和Arya正用broom handles模拟骑士交手；年长强壮的Mycah占优，击中Arya手指使她掉落木棍。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 文本明确二人在playing at knights，武器是broom handles；Mycah占优和Arya受伤都发生在双方同意的练习中。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Arya与Mycah正在双方同意下用木棍练习；Mycah年长强壮并击中Arya，但没有使用真剑。

blocks.original_text: Prince Joffrey laughed. The boy looked around, wide-eyed and startled, and dropped his stick in the grass. The girl glared at them, sucking on her knuckles to take the sting out, and Sansa was horrified. “Arya?” she called out incredulously.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey发笑，Mycah惊慌丢棍；Arya怒视并吸吮受伤指节，Sansa震惊认出妹妹。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey笑声先让Mycah意识到社会权力进入游戏；木棍落地标志平等练习结束。

blocks.original_text: “Go away,” Arya shouted back at them, angry tears in her eyes. “What are you doing here? Leave us alone.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya含着愤怒眼泪命二人离开，不要打扰她们。

Joffrey examined the boy, an ungainly lad with a coarse, freckled face and thick red hair. “And who are you, boy?” he asked in a commanding tone that took no notice of the fact that the other was a year his senior.

blocks.original_text: Sansa had only to glance at Arya and see the flush on her sister’s face to know the boy was telling the truth, but Joffrey was in no mood to listen. The wine had made him wild. “Are you going to pick up your sword?”

blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa知道Mycah说真话，也看出wine使Joffrey失控；她不是没看见，而是尚未让这些观察改变对prince的总体判断。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Sansa从Arya反应判断Mycah所说属实，也判断wine使Joffrey变得wild。

blocks.original_text: “And you’re only a butcher’s boy, and no knight.” Joffrey lifted Lion’s Tooth and laid its point on Mycah’s cheek below the eye, as the butcher’s boy stood trembling. “That was my lady’s sister you were hitting, do you know that?” A bright bud of blood blossomed where his sword pressed into Mycah’s flesh, and a slow red line trickled down the boy’s cheek.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey以他只是butcher’s boy、不是knight回应，把Lion’s Tooth抵在其眼下脸颊并压出流血伤口。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey用“only”同时缩小Mycah身份和他的木棍，随后用真钢在眼下见血，阶级语言转化为身体暴力。

blocks.original_text: Sansa slid off her mare, but she was too slow. Arya swung with both hands. There was a loud crack as the wood split against the back of the prince’s head, and then everything happened at once before Sansa’s horrified eyes. Joffrey staggered and whirled around, roaring curses. Mycah ran for the trees as fast as his legs would take him. Arya swung at the prince again, but this time Joffrey caught the blow on Lion’s Tooth and sent her broken stick flying from her hands. The back of his head was all bloody and his eyes were on fire. Sansa was shrieking, “No, no, stop it, stop it, both of you, you’re spoiling it,” but no one was listening. Arya scooped up a rock and hurled it at Joffrey’s head. She hit his horse instead, and the blood bay reared and went galloping off after Mycah. “Stop it, don’t, stop it!” Sansa screamed. Joffrey slashed at Arya with his sword, screaming obscenities, terrible words, filthy words. Arya darted back, frightened now, but Joffrey followed, hounding her toward the woods, backing her up against a tree. Sansa didn’t know what to do. She watched helplessly, almost blind from her tears.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa下马太慢；Arya击破木棍打伤Joffrey后脑，Joffrey以真剑反击并把她逼向树，Mycah逃跑、马匹受惊，Sansa只会哭喊双方正在毁掉一切。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa反复喊“you’re spoiling it”，把真实刀剑危险首先理解为毁掉浪漫日；她的故事滤镜此刻成为行动瘫痪。

blocks.original_text: Then a grey blur flashed past her, and suddenly Nymeria was there, leaping, jaws closing around Joffrey’s sword arm. The steel fell from his fingers as the wolf knocked him off his feet, and they rolled in the grass, the wolf snarling and ripping at him, the prince shrieking in pain. “Get it off,” he screamed. “Get it off!”

blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Nymeria咬的是Joffrey持剑手臂；Arya一声命令后它立即松口。

blocks.original_text: Jofftey made a scared whimpery sound as he looked up at her. “No,” he said, “don’t hurt me. I’ll tell my mother.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey恐惧地求Arya别伤害自己，并威胁要告诉mother。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 失去剑与保护者后，Joffrey的威胁退化为告诉mother，显示“almost a man grown”外表下仍是依赖母权的孩子。

blocks.original_text: “You leave him alone!” Sansa screamed at her sister.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa尖叫要求Arya别再碰Joffrey。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段从Arya与Mycah的木棍练习升级为Joffrey持真剑的阶级欺凌；Arya和Nymeria反击后，Sansa的浪漫叙事彻底破裂。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: Arya whirled and heaved the sword into the air, putting her whole body into the throw. The blue steel flashed in the sun as the sword spun out over the river. It hit the water and vanished with a splash. Joffrey moaned. Arya ran off to her horse, Nymeria loping at her heels.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya把Lion’s Tooth全力扔进Trident，随后骑马带Nymeria逃离。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya没有用Lion’s Tooth伤害倒地者，而是扔进河里，实际消除继续暴力的武器后逃走。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: After they had gone, Sansa went to Prince Joffrey. His eyes were closed in pain, his breath ragged. Sansa knelt beside him. “Joffrey,” she sobbed. “Oh, look what they did, look what they did. My poor prince. Don’t be afraid. I’ll ride to the holdfast and bring help for you.” Tenderly she reached out and brushed back his soft blond hair.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa跪到受伤Joffrey身边，把事件表述成“他们对你做的”，温柔安慰并准备去holdfast求援。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa说“他们对你做的”已把Joffrey归为纯受害者、Arya和Nymeria归为共同施害者，删去了Mycah被剑逼迫的前因。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Sansa的浪漫叙事、姐妹差异、宫廷礼仪、阶级判断或河边冲突升级。

blocks.original_text: His eyes snapped open and looked at her, and there was nothing but loathing there, nothing but the vilest contempt. “Then go,” he spit at her. “And don’t touch me.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey睁眼只以憎恨和轻蔑看她，吐出命令让她离开且别碰自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 结尾用loathing和contempt彻底反转prince的温柔外观；Sansa的抚触不再被读作爱，而被Joffrey体验为屈辱见证。
